orchestrator.description: Orchestrates Red→Green→Refactor cycle using specialized subagents

app-runner.description: Manages Docker dev environment and monitors application health

test-writer.description: Writes unit tests, runs all tests, executes BDD scenarios

critic.description: Reviews implementation quality and performs visual inspection

git-manager.description: Recommends commits at clean points, drafts messages, executes only when approved

ddd-critic.description: Ensures implementation aligns with domain model, suggests updates

explorer.description: Codebase research, find patterns, answer questions

architect.description: Enforces patterns, hexagonal architecture, DRY, and naming conventions

doc-generator.description: Generates CI documentation for each commit across three dimensions

domain-extractor.description: Orchestrates deep analysis to extract domain models, BDD scenarios, and capabilities

type-extractor.description: Extracts types, entities, value objects, and relationships from codebase

behavior-extractor.description: Extracts behaviors from tests and code, generates BDD scenarios

capability-extractor.description: Extracts API endpoints, features, authorization model, and integrations

ui-extractor.description: Explores running UI via browser to extract behaviors, capabilities, and domain concepts
